case_title: HIGH SEAS CONSULTING, INC. VS. RAMBLER'S WAY FARM INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIGH SEAS CONSULTING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMBLER'S WAY FARM INC. $190,687.19 PRINCIPAL, $4,042.29 INTEREST, $705.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $195,434.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100046123)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100045469) AS TO DEFENDANT RAMBLER'S WAY FARM INC.
DECLARATION OF SSZ (TRANSACTION ID # 100046123) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HIGH SEAS CONSULTING, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-11-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
